name: relace-compact-omp
description: Relace Compact trace compaction integration for oh-my-pi
author: Antigravity

ui.label: Enable Relace Compaction
ui.description: Whether to use Relace Compact to compress conversation history.

ui.label: Relace API Key
ui.description: API key from app.relace.ai to authorize compaction requests.

ui.label: Relace Compact Endpoint
ui.description: API URL for trace compaction (can be changed to swap endpoints).

ui.label: Relace Target Tokens / Percent
ui.description: Integer token budget, or percentage of the active model context when threshold type is percentage.

ui.label: Relace Threshold Type
ui.description: Interpret the target as tokens or as a percentage of the active model context.
